description_long: This is a modern, three-story house with a striking black and white facade, featuring large blue-tinted windows arranged in a grid pattern. The ground floor includes a gated driveway with a carport and a small landscaped area with a tree, enclosed by a white perimeter wall. The second floor has a balcony with glass railings and outdoor seating, while the third floor features a partially open rooftop terrace with a pool and lounge area. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a mix of flat and slightly overhanging roof sections. The house combines clean lines, geometric forms, and a mix of solid and transparent materials for a contemporary urban look. The overall design emphasizes privacy on the sides and openness at the front and rooftop.
description: A modern three-story house with a black and white facade, large blue windows, a gated driveway, and a rooftop terrace with a pool. The design features clean lines, glass railings, and a mix of open and private spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black and white facade, large blue windows, gated driveway, carport, and landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-railed balcony, rooftop terrace, and the mix of window sizes on a mostly white wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a flat roof section, and a simple white and gray exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly black wall with symmetrical windows and the white perimeter fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a modern gate, a recessed door, and a small landscaped area, with no porch or columns.
